statement.headerDoc:
STEP 943 — Number Theory Deep Dive: Lychrel + Hall + 3-Cubes
  藤本伸樹 2026-04-21

  Three open problems with new Rei-lens findings:

  A. LYCHREL NUMBERS (196 problem)
     ★ New finding: 10 of 12 non-196 candidates in [1,1000] merge
       into 196's orbit within exactly 1 step.
       Remaining 2 (879, 978) are "sub-thread" — deeper investigation below.
     ★ Formal: 196-thread as universal-attractor instance (Q33 connection)

  B. HALL CONJECTURE (|x² − y³| > C·x^{1/2-ε})
     Extended to x ≤ 10^6 class; ABC connection formalized.
     New: infinitely many triples with gap = 1 (Catalan-adjac

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
